exploration_notes: Three core files handle memory-pressure eviction: (1) `api/types.go` defines the eviction signal `SignalMemoryAvailable = "memory.available"`, the `Threshold` struct, and the `OpForSignal` map that associates memory signals with the LessThan operator — these constitute the memory pressure eviction thresholds. (2) `eviction_manager.go` implements the eviction manager's decision logic in `synchronize()`, which checks thresholds against observations, ranks pods, and calls `evictPod()` to kill the c
